column1: Hey Tyler, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
We are the 16th to the 20th of March
Aight bet bro. which destination were we interested in?
Word thats where I'll be too
How many ppl in your group so far?
I'll have an exact number in the next few days
I'll let you know as soon as I can
just need an estimate for now so I can get you pricing
then we can go from there
aight bettt thats solid. you all from the same school?
Okay word yea! we're working with another chapter at FSU too
y'all def know how to party fs!
Ya u don't gotta worry bout that😂
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things locked in?
Gonna include the info you give in the text I send out
Im gonna send a big text to our gc sometime today to get a rough number, probably shooting to get everything locked in before Christmas/new years since everyone's busy studying for finals this week.
Aight bet. things are moving fast rn for sure so the sooner the better. I'll slide a discount in there for you and a payment plan to make it easy on everyone
Bet, I'll get things moving quick once I got all the info.
heard you. is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
just sent that over bro. extended the cyber week deal from last week in there for you. it's $75 off on top of the prices in the email
also as the group leader I can get you hooked up with a free stay with your group size
Sounds good brotha I'll get that information to everyone asap
Do most people do the flights w yall or just get their own
Just feel like it'd be a lot easier to do it w yall
we can do either way. its def cheaper to do separately on your own tho
depends if ppl want the convenience or to save $
But I feel you its def easier to have it all done in one shot
which airport we gon fly out of? I'll take a look
Can do orlando, Jacksonville or Tampa
Tampa lookin like the cheapest rn though
lowkey bro, Orlando March 15 - 20 might be a better one. Jet Blue
Non Stops, and a major airline
I thought the dates we had were the 14th to 18th
I mean I'm good w 15th to 20th just was basing it off the email u sent
Oh yea dates are def flexible. just sent that dates most people fly in
did you want to do the 4 night option tho? I can look at 15-19
Ya last year 4 nights was definitely enough for everyone so that's what I think we'll do
bet bet. same flight with the 15-19 vibe https://www.google.com/travel/flights/s/SqvZ4r8TqnTy8L8bA
Got you. y'all def gonna enjoy Punta then fs. def a party vibe all week
Could u possibly get me a quote to see how much it would be for us to do the flights through yall
Aight bet, yea I got you. tbr its gonna be a little more than what we see here on the links above. but, it does guarantee everyone the same price
with flights, if each of y'all were to try getting them individually, the price will def go up as ppl buy it
if that makes sense. while ours just gets everyone one round price
but it will be like $150+ more ngl. to get everyone the same rate across the board
I mean it's just a lot of these kids are retarded and I'd rather be able to make sure everyone gets there around the same time and actually make sure they get there😂
yea nah I feel you 100% bro lol
give them less to think about
Looking like 15th to 20th out of Orlando would be best bet
instead of 15-19? flight pricing will prolly be the same
Actually that's what I meant my b
Just sent out text like 5 minutes ago and already got 15 guys
I talked to guys that did it last year and they said everyone just doing flights separately so that's what I think we'll do
With that if you wanna put us in for 15th to 19th so we can get the trip page up and movin
Just needa know when ppl will be able to start depositing to secure their slots
Would the 12th for first deposit work
Could do later to make sure everyone gets in first since everyone's taking finals this week and are probably distracted
The 12th could work bro. lemme see what I can finesse with the discount cause it may be a little stretch
Ya my b for not getting on it sooner
Kinda was last minute of me doing this cuz no one else would😂
Nah you good bro its a lot of guys to get together. plus finals
and you boutta get a free stay out of it so works out lol
Loved “and you boutta get a free stay out of it so works out lol”
just emailed the reservation over with the trip page
got the price down to $599 for the 4 night
Bet I appreciate it I'll start getting people on
Bet bet. ppl can start depositing to lock in their spot whenever, its active and ready
I can add more slots once we need it too just lmk. theres 16 rn

Hey man, got around 40 guys atm, still probably gonna add more. With that I think we're gonna need more time w the first deposit date with finals and a lot of kids still needing to talk to their parents abt it. If you can't do that $50 discount because of that it's chill but if we could push the first deposit to the 19th I could get a lot more people.
Word bro. your groups gonna be lit, I already know
I can finesse some things, but ideally we can't wait til 12/19 for all 40 heads to deposit
I wont be able to hold the reservation that long without any activity
are there a handful of guys that are 100% locked that can slide on for the 12th? that'll give me leverage to let the ops team know whats up and get it extended to the 19th for the rest
Ya can definitely get the ball rolling on as many as possible
Just didn't know that we could do different dates
Oh bet yea yea I can finesse bro. lets just get the ppl in that we can
once that happens I can move and shake with the operations team. will tell them your one of my personal friend groups
Bet I'll get em on it
Just hit me if any questions come up

once everyone starts to get paid in full you'll get reimbursed your deposit
or I can throw on like the party pass or something along with the free stay
all depends on what you want

And could u add add a few more rooms
Yoyo, yea he can leave whenever he wants thats straight
And yea Ill add those slots rn
got 36 slots in there now. lmk if you need more
Loved “got 36 slots in there now. lmk if you need more”
My brotha, just checkin in. Spoke to Finn earlier about some potential vid/photo stuff. Cool ppls fs
How things lookin with the boys on your end

Ya between that and everyone finishing up finals
Should get more to do it tmrw

which room does he want to be in

All good fam. Sorry to hear that my condolences to you and yours
Ya holidays were a lil rough but I'm back now

however many you can bro, theres no minimum no pressure
how many is it lookin like rn?
Gonna at least fill out the rooms that already have people signed up and then maybe one more
Sending out a text to everyone rn to say it's your last chance to join and then I'm just gonna start removing people from the gc
Also when the rooms got switched Grant Beck paid the 599 amount and the insurance but it's saying he hasn't paid anything yet if you could check in on that
This is what he sent me
Thats odd for sure, never seen that happen before
So looks like Charlie W somehow got into Grant's old spot that he paid for
So, Charlie is unpaid, and Grant is good, gonna transfer that to his account and then Charlie has to make his own payment

And then we should be set

all good bro keep me posted

yo so both Grant and charlie are gonna have to go back in and re-create accounts on their slots. Grant TBA in room 2 and Charlie TBA in room 3. They'll select join this trip next to their names, and then follow the prompts again like they dd earlier this month
Grant's payment will be all set once he's done. Charlie, we need him to make a deposit today
Liked “Grant's payment will be all set once he's done. Charlie, we need him to make a deposit today”

He may need to try a new email
Does he have another email he can use

The room with Grant and Caiden they bailed and said they got refunded so you can remove that room from the trip
So it's just the 3 full rooms that'll be going

mentioned he wanted to do video
word and is Keaton Roberts going anymore?

I'll hit up ops, will see what they same tomorrow am
tell him i said hope the fam is good

my dog, just checkin in on Keaton
He's doing it tn and if he doesn't you can take him off

Gotcha I'm with him just relayed the message
yoyoo Keaton lmk he's not rollin. so that room is now a 3 person room which changes the balance for the 3 guys a little bit. they all have a balance of $40

Says he can't login to his account
No he has it just says it won't let him login
What happens when he tries to log in
Only way to help him is to know what he's seeing
This is what it has for him
Ah man that screenshot not opening for me
When he try's to reset his password it wouldn't send the email to let him
have him follow this link, scroll down to his name, and hit the join trip button next to his name. itll let him create a new log in https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/share/HVKR25D8SP

and then, Maroca event will be at Pearl Beach Club which is a fire outdoor spot
here are the dates Sunday March 15 - Coco Bongo Monday March 16 - Pearl Beach Club Tuesday March 17 - Imagine Cave
your booze cruise would be either the 15th or 16th. they schedule it when you arrive

yoyo just lmk and I'll add it in for you

also did y'all wanna add any party pass tickets to your packages?
